title: Study reveals gender-based diet inequality in ancient European societies
description: A new Simon Fraser University study has found men in ancient Europe likely had better access to protein-rich foods than women did.

title: Molecular fossils shed light on ancient global warming events
description: Evidence from an ancient warming event could reshape how scientists predict Earth’s long-term climate future.

title: Ancient Sherwood Forest oak tree reputed to have sheltered Robin Hood has died
description: The Major Oak became famous as a tourist attraction thanks to its connection to Robin Hood. It's now believed to have died after it failed to produce any new leaves this spring.
